Off Calendar Jul-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kathleen R. Scanlan, Esq. of SIDEMAN & BANCROFT 392-1960, for plaintiff TRANSCONTINENTAL INSURANCE COMPANY, OF ILLINOIS moving for attorney Steven G. York's Application to appear Pro Hac Vice for PLAINTIFF

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Counsel presented the certificate of proof for payment to the Court. The Court adopted its Tentative ruling -- Attorney Steven G. York's Application to appear Pro Hac Vice for PLAINTIFF TRANSCONTINENTAL INSURANCE COMPANY, OF ILLINOIS -- granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (REQ/301/JU) Reporter: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
